Coenzyme Q10 is a vitamin-like compound also called ubiquinone.
Objective: To make the measures of the content of coenzyme Q10 capsules under control.
One nutrient mentioned more extensively below, Coenzyme Q10, is documented to double the mean life expectancy of experimental animals.
The activity level of the oldest animals in the Coenzyme Q10 longevity study was reportedly equal to that of the youngest!
